Class MediaFile

java.lang.Object
mosqueira.pureStream.Modelo.MediaFile
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class MediaFile extends Object implements Serializable
Represents a downloaded media file and its metadata.

This class encapsulates information about a local file (name, MIME type, absolute path, size, and download date). It is mainly used to populate UI components such as tables and lists within the PureStream application.

It also contains optional fields related to synchronization with a remote library (e.g. remote identifier, uploader, and network state).

Version:
1.0
Author:
Romina
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • MediaFile

      public MediaFile(File file, Date downloadDate)
      Creates a new MediaFile from a local File and a download date.

      This constructor extracts metadata such as name, size and MIME type from the file system. If the MIME type cannot be detected, it will be set to "unknown".

      Parameters:
      file - local file representing the media
      downloadDate - date when the file was downloaded (or added to the library)

  • Method Details

    • getFileName

      public String getFileName()
      Returns the media file name (e.g. "video.mp4").
      Returns:
      file name

    • getMimeType

      public String getMimeType()
      Returns the detected MIME type of the file.
      Returns:
      MIME type, or "unknown" if it cannot be detected

    • getFile

      public File getFile()
      Returns the file as a File instance using the stored absolute path.
      Returns:
      local file reference

    • setFilePath

      public void setFilePath(String newPath)
      Updates the absolute path of the file.
      Parameters:
      newPath - new absolute path

    • getFileSizeBytes

      public long getFileSizeBytes()
      Returns the file size in bytes.
      Returns:
      file size in bytes

    • getFormattedDate

      public String getFormattedDate()
      Returns the download date formatted for display in the UI.
      Returns:
      formatted date string (pattern "dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm")

    • getSizeInMB

      public double getSizeInMB()
      Returns the file size expressed in megabytes (MB).
      Returns:
      size in MB

    • getDateDownloaded

      public Date getDateDownloaded()
      Returns the raw Date when the file was downloaded (or added).
      Returns:
      download date

    • getNetworkState

      public String getNetworkState()
      Returns the network state of this media file.
      Returns:
      network state (e.g. "LOCAL", "NETWORK", "BOTH")

    • setNetworkState

      public void setNetworkState(String networkState)
      Updates the network state of this media file.
      Parameters:
      networkState - new network state value

    • getRemoteId

      public Integer getRemoteId()
      Returns the remote identifier, if the media file exists in the remote library.
      Returns:
      remote id, or null if not assigned

    • setRemoteId

      public void setRemoteId(Integer remoteId)
      Sets the remote identifier of this file.
      Parameters:
      remoteId - remote id to assign

    • getUploadedBy

      public String getUploadedBy()
      Returns the uploader identifier associated with this media file, if any.
      Returns:
      uploader id/name, or null if not set

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a user-friendly representation for list renderers.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      file name

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object obj)
      Checks equality based on the absolute file path.
      Overrides:
      equals in class Object
      Parameters:
      obj - object to compare
      Returns:
      true if both objects refer to the same file path

    • hashCode

      public int hashCode()
      Generates a hash code using the file path, consistent with equals(Object).
      Overrides:
      hashCode in class Object
      Returns:
      hash code for this media file
